title: C4 Therapeutics, Roche Ink USD 1 Billion Cancer Drug Deal for Novel DAC Therapies

contentHtml:
New Delhi: C4 Therapeutics, opens new tab said on Thursday it has entered into a deal ‚Äãfocused on research and development of ‚Äåa type of cancer drug with Swiss drugmaker Roche, opens new tab that could be worth more ‚Äãthan USD 1 billion.

  • The companies will collaborate on ‚Äãtwo programs to develop degrader-antibody conjugates ‚ÅÝagainst undisclosed oncology targets exclusive to ‚Äãthe agreement.
  • Degrader-antibody conjugates (DAC) are an emerging ‚Äãclass of cancer therapies that combine antibody-drug conjugation with targeted protein degradation technology.
  • Roche will be ‚Äãresponsible for advancing DAC candidates through ‚Äãpreclinical and clinical development as well as commercialization.
  • C4T ‚Äåwill ‚ÅÝreceive a $20 million upfront payment for the two programs. If Roche exercises its option for a third target, C4T ‚Äãwill receive ‚Äãan additional ‚ÅÝpayment.
  • C4T is also eligible to receive over $1 billion in discovery, ‚Äãregulatory and commercial milestone payments, ‚Äãand ‚ÅÝentitled to tiered royalties on future sales.
  • The agreement marks the third collaboration between ‚ÅÝthe ‚Äãtwo companies and extends ‚Äãa relationship that began in 2016.

Source : Reuters
